Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses And Responsive Documents And Writings From Defendant Bank Of The West Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Apr-27-2023 Continued To May-19-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
Emily McGrath, Esq. of Lawless Lawless & McGrath, 415.391.7555, for Plaintiff Jacqueline Christensen;
Ryan Finn, Esq. of Ogletree Deakins Nash Smoak & Stewart P.C., 415.442.4810, for Defendant Bank of the West;
Jacqueline Hamasaki, Esq. of Ogletree Deakins Nash Smoak & Stewart P.C., 415.442.4810, for Defendant Bank of the West; appears to observe only.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF JACQUELINE CHRISTENSEN'S Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses And Responsive Documents And Writings From Defendant Bank Of The West.

Defendant Bank of the West DOES NOT stipulate to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge.

Argument is held.

At the conclusion of argument, the motion is continued to May 19, 2023, at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, on the Law & Motion calendar.

Judge Pro Tem Deol is to prepare a report and recommendation.

The parties are to meet and confer on what does not need to be addressed in the motion. Mr. Finn is to submit what is moot and Ms. McGrath may respond. Following the meet and confer, the parties are to provide the requested information/update to Judge Pro Tem Deol by May 5, 2023.

Judge Pro Tem: John Paul Deol. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Court Reporter: Sheila Pham, CSR #13293, Tel. 415.274.9977, Email: calendar-la@veritext.com. Bailiff: Not Present. (JPT/302)
